title: Space Fleet Logistics
description:
Space Fleet Logistics puts you in command of the Federation's war effort across a contested star system. Victory isn't just about firepower — it's about keeping your fleets supplied, your planets stable, and your political influence growing while an enemy faction pushes back.

Manage your supply chains. Raw and manufactured materials must flow from planets to fleets. A fleet that runs dry in the middle of a campaign doesn't fight — it dies. Plan your convoy routes, secure your spaceports, and keep the lines open.

Command your fleets. Assign missions, manage fleet composition, and coordinate engagements across multiple fronts. Combat outcomes depend on preparation as much as execution.

Control the star system. Planets generate resources, influence, and shipbuilding capacity. Stabilize unstable worlds, prevent rebellions, and expand your infrastructure to sustain a long war.

Face a thinking enemy. The AI faction adapts, raids your supply lines, and contests your grip on key systems. Fog of war keeps you honest — you won't always know where the threat is coming from.

A war with a story. A narrative campaign unfolds as the conflict escalates, with events and decisions that shape the course of the war.
description_short: Wars are won by logistics. Command the Federation's fleets across a star system, manage supply chains, secure planets, and outmaneuver a relentless AI enemy. Every battle is decided before it begins.
